name: Krestianskiy Zavtrak (Peasant Breakfast)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 4 tablespoons of butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Saute bread cubes in batches until golden brown and crisp. Transfer to a bowl and set aside.
3. Wipe out the skillet with paper towels.
4. Fry bacon in the skillet over medium heat until it renders out the fat.
5. Add onion and saute until it begins to color, about 8 minutes.
6. Add kielbasa and cook, stirring, until the onion and kielbasa are nicely browned.
7. Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter in a medium-size non-stick skillet over medium heat.
8. Add one-fourth of the kielbasa mixture and one-fourth of the bread to the skillet. Distribute evenly with a wooden spoon.
9. Break 2 eggs into the skillet.
10. Cook for 2 minutes, gently stirring the whites with a thin spatula.
11. When the whites are almost set and yolks are still liquid, reduce heat to low, cover the skillet, and cook for another minute or until desired doneness is achieved.
12. Slide the hash and eggs onto a plate. Repeat with remaining ingredients to make three more portions.
13. Serve immediately sprinkled with fresh dill as garnish.
